failures.claim: Claude Sonnet 4 model ID is claude-sonnet-4-6
failures.actual: MODEL_REGISTRY has claude-sonnet-4-6-20260218 (dated version). The short form claude-sonnet-4-6 is not in MODEL_REGISTRY but would route via claude-* prefix. The table mixes short form with other models that use exact IDs (azure-gpt-4.1, groq-llama-3.3-70b-versatile, gemini-2.5-flash-lite)
